summary: Card created: add Boogu-Image 0.1 (10B, Apache-2.0) via /mpi-add-model + docs/add-model-playbook.md. Primary interest = the Edit variant (instruction-driven single-reference image editing). RECON: the ComfyUI-Boogu custom node is LEGACY and its README says do not install it - Boogu is native in ComfyUI core, so ZERO custom_nodes deps. NO ComfyUI bump needed: user confirmed live on our 0.27.0 engine that the Templates browser already ships TWO official templates, 'Boogu image 0.1 Edit' and 'Boogu Turbo: Text to Image'. User will open the Edit template and build our workflow from it. Weights = huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Boogu-Image (repackaged for native, layout already matches ours). VAE is FLUX.1's - we already ship vae/ae.safetensors as a shared dep, check byte-identity before duplicating. Text encoder is qwen3vl_8b_fp8_scaled - COLLISION WATCH with MPI-242 (Krea2) which is landing Qwen3-VL-4B; name deps by weight file. Do NOT port the upstream prompt rewriter (prompt-gen is Cubric Prompt). Tier-2 naming (Input_*/Output_Image). Edit ref image is required ('taking one input image') so no placeholder.png staging. Possible baked hotfix LoRA. int8_convrot variant exists as a later perf lever (runtime-VARIANT axis already built).

DEFERRED by user so it batches with the Boogu image model (lands ~2026-07-11, node set unknown). Krea2 needs comfyui_controlnet_aux BAKED (has requirements.txt). Krea2 CANNOT run on the REMOTE engine until this ships (both CN node packs are mandatory for EVERY t2i run - ComfyUI validates all node classes before MpiIfElse picks a branch). Local engine unaffected. TORCH TRAP RESOLVED: controlnet_aux is the first baked node listing bare torch/torchvision; it does NOT need a different torch (our 2.12.0+cu130 satisfies it, dry-run verified) - the hazard was OUR --upgrade flag resolving from PyPI (Would install torch-2.13.0). Fixed via installRequirementsCommand without --upgrade; pipPins CANNOT fix it (no --index-url, +cu130 absent from PyPI => pin would fail). Guard: tests/controlnet-aux-torch-guard.test.cjs. Acceptance test for the rebuild: torch.__version__ inside the container MUST still print +cu130.

todo -> doing. Pod image rebuild: bake comfyui_controlnet_aux (Krea2 remote-engine dep). Boogu batching precondition DROPPED by user (Boogu added later by another agent, accepts possible 2nd rebuild). Bump v0.14.0 -> v0.15.0.

(3) POD_IMAGE_VERSION + _CPU v0.14.0->v0.15.0 (app commit a4a8e18a). (4) mpi-ci commit cc008bd pushed. CI run 29134840449 both legs SUCCESS. v0.15.0-cu130 (DockerHub) + v0.15.0-cpu (GHCR) pushed, public, pull-verified. cu130 build passed the +cu130 assert AND the NEW post-node-bake re-assert => controlnet_aux baked without torch drift (the core torch-trap acceptance). cpu boot smoke: /health 200, wrapper_version 0.2.33. App guard test passed. maturity in-progress->validating. OUTSTANDING (user-only): deploy v0.15.0-cu130 Pod + run a Krea2 REMOTE gen (was impossible pre-v0.15.0). validation.md written.

doing->done, USER-VERIFIED LIVE. Krea2 Turbo NSFW generated on the REMOTE engine (t2i_015, 896x1088, 32s, 13.6/16GB VRAM on RTX 2000 Ada, no OOM). v0.15.0 bake proven end-to-end: comfyui_controlnet_aux baked (/opt) + ComfyUI-Krea2-ControlNet volume (/workspace), all CN node classes validated, int8_convrot ran. Also fixed 2 LOCAL app-side bugs surfaced by the first model-declared baked node: (1) requirements_only re-run on baked node -> Errno 2 [downloadManager.js:1345]; (2) parser comment-bleed flagged code-only node baked [remoteModels.js:176]; +regression test image-resident-classification.test.cjs.
